title: Full Keyboard Gameplay
description: now you can play minecraft using just a keyboard to control the camera/destroy blocks and place blocks all without touching a mouse!
body:
# controls
- P to attack/destroy (left click)
- Z to place blocks (right click)
- Arrows to control the camera (it's so smooth)

# how to download it
- click on the download button
- you need forge 1.12.2 for the mod
- cut/copy the file into your forge 1.12.2 .minecraft/mods and then launch it

# how do i control the camera speed
**(WARNING: before starting make sure you leaved minecraft, or remove it from the task manager)**

- go into .minecraft/config
- click on "fullkeyboardgameplay.cfg" (recommended: use notepad for windows 10/11 to read/change the file)
- after editing the "S:CameraSpeed=2.5" save the file or if you are using the notepad app do ctrl+s then launch the game

**ChatGPT helped me too much tho**

# where to report bugs
**create a post in https://www.reddit.com/r/FullKeyboardGameplay/ about your bug and i will review your posts**

# will this mod support more versions soon
**yes, in the future more minecraft versions will support this mod for now you can use it on forge 1.12.2**
